use_cases: Toggle boolean settings in forms and dashboards
Enable or disable features in application settings
Switch between dark/light mode or theme options
Toggle visibility of content or sections
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based accessible switch component with CVA-driven variant customization supporting multiple sizes (sm, default, lg, xl) and color schemes (default, secondary). Built with motion/react for smooth thumb transitions and follows Tailwind CSS conventions. The component is fully accessible with focus-visible states and disabled handling, suitable for any industry requiring toggle functionality.
